name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State definitions *)
THINKING == 0
HUNGRY == 1
EATING == 2

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ forks \in [1..N -> 0..N]
  /\ states \in [1..N -> {THINKING, HUNGRY, EATING}]

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
  /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> THINKING]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N :
    \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
       /\ states[i] = THINKING
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = HUNGRY]
       /\ forks' = forks
    \/ (* Philosopher i starts eating *)
       /\ states[i] = HUNGRY
       /\ forks[i] = 0
       /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 0
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![LEFT(i)] = i]
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = EATING]
    \/ (* Philosopher i stops eating *)
       /\ states[i] = EATING
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![RIGHT(i)] = 0]
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = THINKING]

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K
VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

Producer == /\ count < K
           /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
           /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
           /\ count' = count + 1
           /\ head' = head

Consumer == /\ count > 0
           /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
           /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
           /\ count' = count - 1
           /\ tail' = tail

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = NULL
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = NULL
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE
                 /\ readers' = Append(readers, r)
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers
                 /\ writer_active' = FALSE
                 /\ readers' = Tail(readers)
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers
                 /\ writer_active' = TRUE
                 /\ readers' = readers

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store

---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values
VARIABLES kv

Init == 
    /\ kv \in [Keys -> Values]
    /\ \A k \in Keys: kv[k] = 0

Next == 
    /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
        /\ kv' = [kv EXCEPT ![k] = v]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<>>  \* No other variables

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<kv>>

TypeOK == 
    /\ kv \in [Keys -> Values]
    /\ \A k \in Keys: kv[k] \in Values

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
        /\ flag[2] = FALSE
        /\ turn' = turn
        /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
        /\ flag[2] = TRUE
        /\ turn' = 1
        /\ flag' = [i \in 1..2 |-> IF i = 2 THEN TRUE ELSE flag[i]]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
        /\ flag[2] = FALSE
        /\ turn' = 2
        /\ flag' = [i \in 1..2 |-> IF i = 1 THEN TRUE ELSE flag[i]]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
        /\ flag[2] = TRUE
        /\ turn' = turn
        /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

====

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = known
       /\ infected' = Append(infected, known)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

====

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {c}]
        \/ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \in Pages
          /\ c \in allocated
          /\ free' = free \cup {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {c}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}

Next == 
  \/ /\ turn = 0
      /\ wants = 1
      /\ turn' = 1
      /\ wants' = 0
  \/ /\ turn = 1
      /\ wants = 0
      /\ turn' = 0
      /\ wants' = 1
  \/ /\ turn' = turn
      /\ wants' = wants

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES counts

(* The set of nodes *)
Nodes == <<1, 2, 3>>  (* Example: 3 nodes *)

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ counts \in [Node \in Nodes |-> [Node \in Nodes |-> Int]]
          /\ \A n \in Nodes: \A m \in Nodes: counts[n][m] \in Int

(* Initial state: all counts zero *)
Init == /\ counts \in [Node \in Nodes |-> [Node \in Nodes |-> 0]]
          /\ TypeOK

(* Increment operation: node n increments its own counter *)
Increment(n) == /\ n \in Nodes
          /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][n] = counts[n][n] + 1]
          /\ TypeOK

(* Merge operation: element-wise max *)
Merge(n, m) == /\ n \in Nodes
          /\ m \in Nodes
          /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][m] = Max(counts[n][m], counts[m][m])]
          /\ TypeOK

(* Next-state relation: either increment or merge *)
Next == \/ \E n \in Nodes: Increment(n)
      \/ \E n, m \in Nodes: Merge(n, m)

(* Total count: sum of max(counts[][n]) *)
Total == \A n \in Nodes: Max(counts[][n])

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
